action.reasoning: Observation: Starting from scratch, need a fast baseline to validate pipeline and measure iteration time. Analysis: ResNet50 is pre-downloaded and fast. Weighted loss will help with imbalanced classes. Decision: Write train.py and predict.py with ResNet50, weighted CE loss, basic augmentation, train 5 epochs, and submit eval immediately.
